title: Litheli Cordless Leaf Blower, 604 m³/h 137 km/h Air Speed Battery Blower, 20V Powerful Electric Garden Blower for Blowing Leaves Grass Dust, Electric Garden Leaf Blower with 2.0Ah Battery
features: 【Powerful Cleaning Performance】: The cordless leaf blower has an air speed of 137 km/h and an air flow rate of 604 m³/h. The fan can generate a powerful airflow to remove dry and wet leaves, grass clippings, etc., from the ground or to quickly dry your car without needing to bend down.

【High-Performance Motor】: The battery leaf blower is equipped with a high-performance motor that offers lower maintenance costs, less noise, and strong performance compared to traditional motors. This ensures maximum performance and a longer, smooth operating time.

【Innovative Turbocharger Technology】: The garden blowers offers state-of-the-art turbocharger performance. In addition to using conventional turbocharger technology in the motor, innovative turbocharger technology is also used at the output. This technology consumes less energy while simultaneously generating a higher airflow to maximize air performance. There is a honeycomb-shaped cooler at the bottom that improves cooling efficiency.

【Lightweight and Handy】: The electric leaf blower weighs only 2 kg / 3.25 pounds and has a supportive handle for a more balanced weight distribution. It can be easily operated with one hand by adults. The battery-powered leaf blower is ergonomically designed to ensure a smooth airflow. It has lower resistance, greater airflow, and higher efficiency. The removable air duct facilitates compact storage and storage.

【2 Speed Levels】: The garden leaf blower can be adjusted between 100 km/h and 200 km/h to achieve different airflow speeds. You can adjust the speed of your battery-powered leaf blower with the push of a button to choose the best option in terms of performance, noise level, and working time for the specific task.
